subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which British Viceroy ruled during the establishment of Jaipur State?
question_hi: जैवरी के राज्य को शुरू हुए समय में कौन से ब्रिटिश राज्य का प्रधान राज्य की विभाग का विभाग विभाग के लिए
explanation_en: Earl of Mountbatten, known as Sir Badruddin Mohammad Akbar, was the Viceroy of India during the partition of India and Pakistan. He was indirectly involved in the establishment of Jaipur State by granting it a partial autonomy.
explanation_hi: मॉन्टबटन, बड़रूदिन माउड़ सैंडवेल एक गैंड विभाग से सम्बंधित होंगे, जैंक से संबंध करने वाली गोल एन्ट्री एन टिपी एंड गोल एन टिपी एन ट्री एन टीपी
explanation_en: Earl Mountbatten, also known as Lord Mountbatten, was the last Viceroy of India before independence. He played a significant role in the Indian independence movement and the partition of India and Pakistan. Among the three Viceroys mentioned, he is the one directly connected to Jaipur State.
explanation_hi: मॉन्टेबेटन, या लॉर मॉन्टेबेटन, आपस्टेट एन टीपी, यांन टीपी एन टीपी
question_en: Who was the last Viceroy of India before independence?
question_ar: من كان آخر نائب الملك في الهند قبل الاستقلال؟

subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which royal family ruled Rajasthan before the establishment of the Rajasthan State?
question_ar: أي عائلة ملكية حكمت راجستان قبل تأسيس ولاية راجستان?
options.explanation_en: The Rana Havaldar Singhji was the Chhattam Singhji's successor and ruled Rajasthan before the formation of Rajasthan State.
Vaswami Raja succeeded Rana Havaldar Singhji and ruled Rajasthan before the creation of Rajasthan State.
options.question_en: Who succeeded Rana Havaldar Singhji and ruled Rajasthan before the formation of Rajasthani Province?
Who was the ruler of Rajasthan before the creation of Rajasthani Province?
